title: Cover release package documentation globs
action: Strengthen the release package documentation guard so docs markdown globs in the Package step are checked too. Literal docs/*.md paths must still be checked as existing files, and docs globs must resolve to at least one file.

truths: Literal docs/*.md package inputs still fail when the file is missing.
Docs markdown globs in the release Package step fail when they match no files.
The guard keeps checking the actual release Package step rather than a duplicated manifest.

artifacts.substantive: release documentation guard validates both literal markdown paths and markdown globs

prohibitions: Do not change release target matrix, archive naming, or installer behavior.
Do not duplicate the release package docs list outside the workflow.

verify: bash tests/rename_contract.sh && cargo test --quiet && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings && cd web && npm run bundle && npm run test -- --run

trace.outcome: Release package documentation guard now validates Package-step literal markdown paths and markdown globs.
trace.verify_output: rename contract: ok; cargo test passed: 97 lib/integration tests plus 2 and 3 additional Rust test groups passed, 0 failed; cargo clippy passed with -D warnings; npm run bundle passed; npm run test -- --run passed: 4 files, 20 tests. Vitest emitted the existing jsdom HTMLCanvasElement.getContext not-implemented stderr from xterm, but exited 0.
trace.verify_command: bash tests/rename_contract.sh && cargo test --quiet && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings && cd web && npm run bundle && npm run test -- --run
